name: OCU P7 — Cross-Platform Automation Flows
description: 15 test cases mapping the same Engine/Bridge automation flows to web (CDP), Linux (X11), Android, and Android TV backends. Each verifies that the unified Engine.Perform interface behaves identically across all four CaptureSource backends.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.

test_cases.name: web-capture-click-sequence

steps.name: Capture + Click via web/CDP backend stubs

test_cases.expected_result: Engine dispatches click on web backend; Result.Success=true

test_cases.name: web-type-and-submit

steps.name: Type text then press Enter key on web backend

test_cases.expected_result: Type + Key(Enter) dispatched successfully on web backend

steps.name: Analyze frame on web backend; verify DispatchedTo set
Capture frame + Scroll via linux/X11 backend stubs

test_cases.name: linux-drag-gesture

steps.name: Drag from point A to B on linux backend

test_cases.expected_result: Drag dispatched successfully on linux/X11 backend

steps.name: RecordClip on linux backend; clip EvidenceRef produced

test_cases.name: android-capture-click

steps.name: Capture + Click on Android backend stubs

test_cases.expected_result: Engine click dispatches on Android backend; Result.Success=true

steps.name: Key press BACK on Android backend

test_cases.name: androidtv-dpad-navigate

steps.name: DPAD key navigation on Android TV backend stubs

test_cases.expected_result: DPAD key dispatched on Android TV backend; Result.Success=true

test_cases.name: androidtv-capture-analyze

steps.name: Capture then Analyze on Android TV backend

test_cases.expected_result: Capture produces screenshot_before EvidenceRef; Analyze populates DispatchedTo

test_cases.name: androidtv-scroll-carousel

steps.name: Scroll carousel on Android TV (DX>0 horizontal)

test_cases.expected_result: Horizontal scroll dispatched on Android TV backend

test_cases.name: bridge-cross-platform-click

steps.name: Bridge.ExecuteAction(click) works across all 4 platforms via stub Engine

test_cases.expected_result: Bridge delegates click to Engine; Result.Success=true on all platforms

test_cases.name: bridge-cross-platform-full-sequence

steps.name: Bridge 5-action sequence identical on all platforms

test_cases.expected_result: All 5 actions (click/type/key/scroll/drag) succeed across all platforms via stub Engine

test_cases.name: evidence-mapping-cross-platform

steps.name: FromAutomationResult maps EvidenceRefs identically regardless of platform

test_cases.expected_result: FromAutomationResult is platform-agnostic; mapping correct on all platforms
